title: Stuffed Middle Eastern Turnips (Enab) with French Twist
description: A fusion recipe blending French flavors with traditional Middle Eastern turnip (enab) filling.
instructions: 2. Prepare turnips: peel and chop them into medium-sized pieces.
3. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat and sauté garlic until fragrant.
4. Add chopped parsley to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
5. Stuff each turnip with the parsley mixture, followed by crumbled goat cheese.
6. Drizzle olive oil over the turnips and season with salt and pepper.
7. Bake the stuffed turnips in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes or until tender.
